constructs.instructions_verbatim: Then, they were asked to rate hundred words ranging from 1 (very feminine) to 7 (very masculine).
constructs.citation: Roberts, B. E., & Utych, S. M. (2019). Linking gender and language: Developing a database of masculine and feminine words. American Politics Research, 47, 1155-1173.
constructs.instructions_llm: Rate the gender association of this word. Range: 1-7 (1 = very feminine, 7 = very masculine). Reply with one number.
